channels.label: Grants
channels.description: First-loss grant capital deployed directly to non-revenue-generating reconstruction (schools, hospitals, cultural heritage). No return expected.

channels.label: Concessional Loans
channels.description: Below-market rate loans for public-sector and municipal infrastructure. Return: 1–2% real. Recycled to corpus on repayment.

channels.label: Strategic Equity
channels.description: Equity stakes in nationally strategic enterprises (energy, ports, telecoms, agri-infrastructure). Target return: 6–8% real.

channels.label: Availability Payments
channels.description: Annual payment stream backing senior concessional debt — the mechanism enabling project financing without full upfront capital.

channels.label: Endowment Reserve
channels.description: Retained in corpus to generate future returns. Not deployed in current period. Grows the NAV base.

constraint: Percentages must sum to 100. Endowment reserve minimum 5% to preserve corpus.
source_notes: Channel proportions inspired by ISIF directed investment mandate (2014) and GPFG drawdown rules (§7 of the Management Mandate). Availability payment channel modelled on UNCC compensation mechanism precedent.
